---
title: "parse_timestamp"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `parse_timestamp()`

Parse Date Input to Unix Timestamp

## Usage

```r
parse_timestamp(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | Date, character, POSIXt, or numeric (already Unix timestamp). |

## Value

Integer. Unix timestamp in seconds.

## Description

Converts various date inputs to Unix timestamp (seconds).
